proposal_summary: This proposal outlines Cycle 3 of the Uniswap Delegate Reward Initiative, seeking to compensate up to 15 eligible delegates for their active participation in Uniswap governance over a 6-month period, with a total requested budget of 540,000 USD worth of UNI.

disclosed_entities.name: StableLab
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: In late February 2024, StableLab proposed the Uniswap Delegate Reward Initiative

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap Delegate Reward Working Group
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: formation of the Uniswap Delegate Reward Working Group

disclosed_entities.name: Accountability Committee
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The total amount, once approved, will be sent to the Accountability Committee, which will be responsible for the monthly distribution

disclosed_entities.name: UNI
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: We are requesting 540,000 [6000 USD *6 Months *15 Delegates ] USD worth of UNI for cycle 3

claimed_actions.raw_action: The total amount, once approved, will be sent to the Accountability Committee, which will be responsible for the monthly distribution of rewards to eligible delegates.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Fund the Accountability Committee to distribute monthly rewards to up to 15 delegates for 6 months.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The total amount, once approved, will be sent to the Accountability Committee... We are requesting 540,000 [6000 USD *6 Months *15 Delegates ] USD worth of UNI

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal defines a comprehensive evaluation framework for selecting candidates and enforcing distribution requirements for delegates over 6 months.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Application Eligibility... Metrics... Delegate Reward Eligibility... Budget

limitations: No target address, execution actions, or smart contract function calls are provided explicitly in the text.
